data.title: Healthcare Analytics Market to reach $166.65 billion by 2030, growing from $55.52 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 24.6%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 23, 2026, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets™ that the Healthcare Analytics Market is forecasted to increase from approximately USD 55.52 billion in 2025 to USD 166.65 billion by 2030, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 24.6%. The data is based on analysis across 516 market Tables and 55 Figures distributed in 411.

data.title: Inventor from Bronx develops high-definition TV (CLEAN CONNECT) to eliminate cables. Pittsburg, Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 23, 2026, an inventor from Bronx, New York, unveiled a revolutionary high-definition television called CLEAN CONNECT. The inventor expressed the desire to eliminate the necessity of running cables between the television and different devices. This innovative TV aims to offer convenience and a clutter-free solution to traditional setups by incorporating cutting-edge technology.

data.title: RIKS 26 0216 series size after buyback on Jan 23 is 47,383,080,943 (nominal value) - a significant increase.
data.description: After the buyback on January 23rd, the RIKS 26 0216 series has increased to a total size of 47,383,080,943 in nominal value.

data.title: US stocks mixed; Dow falls over 200 points. Dow at 49,158.56 (-0.46%), NASDAQ at 23,481.32 (+0.19%), S&P 500 at 6,915.27 (+0.03%). Energy shares gain 1.3%, financial stocks dip 0.8%. SLB Limited Q4 revenue: $9.745B. Diluted GAAP EPS at 55 cents.
data.description: This morning in the U.S., stocks saw a rise, despite the Dow Jones index falling over 200 points on Friday. As of the market opening today, the Dow was down by 0.46% at 49,158.56, the NASDAQ increased by 0.19% to 23,481.32, and the S&P 500 rose by 0.03% to 6,915.27. Energy shares experienced a gain of 1.3%, while financial stocks fell by 0.8% on Friday. SLB Limited (NYSE: SLB) reported fourth-quarter results on Friday, showing a sequential improvement with revenue totaling $9.745 billion, a 5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the $9.547 billion estimate by analysts. Diluted GAAP earnings per share were 55 cents, a decline from 77 cents in the previous year. For further information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Avangrid Utilities ready for Winter Storm Fern impact in Northeast; NYSEG, RG&E, CMP, and UI preparing for severe weather.
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company under the Iberdrola Group, revealed that its utility firms, New York State Electric & Gas (NYSEG), Rochester Gas and Electric (RG&E), Central Maine Power (CMP), and United Illuminating (UI), are closely monitoring and readying for severe winter conditions forecasted in the Northeast this weekend. The company remains devoted to making substantial investments to ensure preparedness for extreme weather, including freezing temperatures.

data.title: RFID Market to hit $30.47B by 2034, growing at 8.5% CAGR from $14.58B in 2025 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 23, 2026, there are reports indicating a significant growth projection in the RFID market. According to data from MarketsandMarkets™, it is anticipated to increase from USD 14.58 billion recorded in 2025 to USD 30.47 billion by 2034. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.5%. The research includes a comprehensive analysis presented in 180 market data tables and 65 figures distributed across 320 pages, along with a detailed Table of Contents for further insights.

data.title: Yutong Bus sends 723 buses to support sports event and urban mobility in Morocco, showcasing commitment to African development.
data.description: With a wealth of expertise in organizing large-scale global events and a strong dedication to enhancing Africa's public transportation infrastructure, Yutong Bus (Stock Code: SHA: 600066) played a significant role in the recent African International Sports Tournament in Tangier, Morocco. The tournament, which took place in December, showcased Yutong's commitment to advancing sustainable transport solutions in the region.
